name: Jiangsu Zongyi Co.,LTD
summary: Jiangsu Zongyi Co.,LTD engages in the clean energy, advanced technology, and integrated finance businesses. It constructs and manages photovoltaic power stations in Italy, the United States, Germany, Bulgaria, Romania, and the Xinjiang region. The company also provides information technology products, including high-end chips, such as hearing aids; micro-crypto products; and smart card security products, as well as offers traditional Chinese medicine products and new materials. In addition, it is involved in the equity investment activities. The company was founded in 1987 and is based in Nantong, China.
